descriptions.1000: Device type. Identifies this as a CiA 442 motor management starter (profile 0x1BA). Read by master to confirm correct device class.
descriptions.1001: Error register. Mandatory CANopen error status byte. Bit0=generic, Bit1=current fault, Bit2=voltage fault, Bit3=temperature, Bit5=device-profile-specific. Sent in every EMCY frame.
descriptions.1003: Pre-defined error field. EMCY error history ring-buffer. sub0 = number of stored entries (write 0 to clear). sub1-5 = most-recent-first 32-bit EMCY error codes.
descriptions.1005: COB-ID of SYNC message. Default 0x80. ULM is SYNC consumer only (not producer).
descriptions.1008: Manufacturer device name string. Read-only. Returns 'ULM Universal Load Manager'.
descriptions.100A: Manufacturer software version string. Format: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH (semver).
descriptions.1010: Store parameters to non-volatile memory. Write 0x65766173 ('save' in ASCII) to sub1 to persist all parameters. Confirmed by echo of same value.
descriptions.1011: Restore factory default parameters. Write 0x64616F6C ('load' in ASCII) to sub1. Motor must be stopped.
descriptions.1014: COB-ID of EMCY (Emergency) message. Default 0x80+NodeID. Set bit31=1 to disable EMCY transmission.
descriptions.1015: Inhibit time for EMCY messages in 100us units. Default 200 = 20ms. Prevents EMCY flood on oscillating faults.
descriptions.1017: Producer heartbeat time in ms. Default 1000ms. Set 0 to disable. NMT master watchdog should be set to 3x this value.
descriptions.1018: Identity object. Contains Vendor-ID, Product code, Revision, Serial number. Used by LSS, network scanners, and configuration tools to identify the device.
descriptions.1018sub1: CiA-registered Vendor ID for ABB. Verify with ABB standards team before production.
descriptions.1018sub2: ABB product code for ULM Universal Load Manager. Replace with ABB product registry number.
descriptions.1018sub3: Firmware revision. High word = major version, low word = minor version.
descriptions.1018sub4: Device serial number. Unique per unit. Set during manufacturing.
descriptions.1029: Error behaviour on communication error. sub1: 0=enter pre-operational, 1=no state change, 2=enter stopped.
descriptions.1029sub1: Communication error. 0=transition to pre-op, 1=no state change, 2=transition to stopped
descriptions.1200: SDO server parameter. Defines COB-IDs for SDO request (client→server = 0x600+NodeID) and response (server→client = 0x580+NodeID).
descriptions.1400: RPDO1 communication parameters. Receives control word (6040h) and motor command byte (6042h:01) from PLC. Async transmission type 254.
descriptions.1400sub1: COB-ID for RPDO1. Default 0x200+NodeID. Set bit31=1 to disable this RPDO.
descriptions.1400sub2: Transmission type for RPDO1. 254=async (process on receipt). 255=async with event-driven filtering.
descriptions.1401: RPDO2 communication parameters. Receives digital output force command (6043h) from PLC.
descriptions.1600: RPDO1 mapping. Maps: Control word 6040h (16-bit) + Motor command 6042h:01 (8-bit) + 8-bit padding = 32-bit frame.
descriptions.1600sub1: Mapping entry 1: object 6040h sub0 (Control word), 16 bits.
descriptions.1600sub2: Mapping entry 2: object 6042h sub1 (Motor command byte), 8 bits.
descriptions.1601: RPDO2 mapping. Maps: DO force command 6043h (8-bit) = 8-bit frame.
descriptions.1601sub1: Mapping entry 1: object 6043h sub0 (DO command bitmap), 8 bits.
descriptions.1800: TPDO1 communication parameters. Transmits ERR and WARN flag words 0-1. 20ms inhibit prevents flag-change burst from flooding bus. 1s event timer refreshes even when flags unchanged.
descriptions.1800sub2: Transmission type. Async, on data change or event timer
descriptions.1800sub3: TPDO1 inhibit time. 200 = 20ms (units: 100us). After a flag change, suppresses retransmission for 20ms. Protects bus from oscillating fault conditions.
descriptions.1800sub5: TPDO1 event timer. 1000 = 1000ms. Forces retransmission every second even without data change. Gives PLC a heartbeat confirmation that flag data is current.
descriptions.1801: TPDO2 communication parameters. Transmits measurement values: avg current (0.1%Ie), avg voltage (0.01%Vnom), cos phi, THD-I, current and voltage imbalance. 10ms inhibit, 500ms event.
descriptions.1802: TPDO3 communication parameters. Transmits thermal state: thermal load %, time to trip, time to cool, PTC temperature. 10ms inhibit, 500ms event.
descriptions.1803: TPDO4 communication parameters. Transmits control status: CiA 442 status word, FSA state, DI bitmap, DO bitmap, start counter. 2ms inhibit for time-critical control loop data.
descriptions.1803sub3: Inhibit time. 2ms inhibit - control status is time-critical
descriptions.1804: TPDO5 communication parameters. Transmits extended ERR and WARN flag words 2-3 (bits 32-63). 20ms inhibit, 1s event. COB-ID 0x500+NodeID is non-default; configure explicitly at commissioning.
descriptions.1804sub1: COB-ID for TPDO5. 0x500+NodeID is outside the CiA 301 pre-defined set. Must be configured explicitly in the CANopen master at commissioning.
descriptions.1A00: TPDO1 mapping. 64-bit: ERR flags word0 (bits 0-15) + ERR flags word1 (bits 16-31) + WARN flags word0 (bits 0-15) + WARN flags word1 (bits 16-31).
descriptions.1A00sub1: ERR flags w0 2005h:01. 2005h sub1 16-bit: ERR bits 0-15
descriptions.1A00sub2: ERR flags w1 2005h:02. 2005h sub2 16-bit: ERR bits 16-31
descriptions.1A00sub3: WARN flags w0 2006h:01. 2006h sub1 16-bit: WARN bits 0-15
descriptions.1A00sub4: WARN flags w1 2006h:02. 2006h sub2 16-bit: WARN bits 16-31
descriptions.1A01: TPDO2 mapping. 64-bit: avg current 16-bit (0.1%Ie) + avg voltage 16-bit (0.01%Vnom) + cos phi 8-bit + THD-I 8-bit + current imbalance 8-bit + voltage imbalance 8-bit.
descriptions.1A01sub1: Avg current 2000h:01. 16-bit: avg current 0.1% of Ie. 10000=100.0% Ie
descriptions.1A01sub2: Avg voltage 2001h:01. 16-bit: avg voltage 0.01% of Vnom. 10000=100.00% Vnom
descriptions.1A02: TPDO3 mapping. 64-bit: thermal load 8-bit + time-to-trip 16-bit + time-to-cool 16-bit + PTC temperature 16-bit INTEGER16 + 8-bit reserved.
descriptions.1A02sub1: Thermal load 2003h:01. 8-bit: 0-100 % of thermal capacity used
descriptions.1A02sub2: Time to trip 2003h:02. 16-bit: seconds until thermal trip. 0xFFFF = not applicable
descriptions.1A02sub3: Time to cool 2003h:03. 16-bit: remaining cooling seconds. 0=restart allowed
descriptions.1A02sub4: PTC temperature 2003h:04. 16-bit INTEGER16: 0.1 degC. Signed. 0x7FFF=sensor not connected
descriptions.1A02sub5: Reserved 8-bit padding. Reserved for future use e.g. active power % of Pnom
descriptions.1A03: TPDO4 mapping. 64-bit: status word 16-bit + FSA state 8-bit + DI status 8-bit + DO status 8-bit + 8-bit reserved + number of starts 16-bit.
descriptions.1A03sub3: DI status 6044h. 8-bit bitmap: bit N = DIN+1 state
descriptions.1A03sub4: DO status 6050h. 8-bit bitmap: bit N = DON+1 actual state
descriptions.1A03sub6: Num starts 2004h:02. 16-bit: total motor starts counter (wraps at 65535)
descriptions.1A04: TPDO5 mapping. 64-bit: ERR flags word2 (bits 32-47) + ERR flags word3 (bits 48-63) + WARN flags word2 (bits 32-47) + WARN flags word3 (bits 48-63).
descriptions.6040: CiA 442 Control word. Written by PLC to command FSA state transitions and motor operation. Bit0=SwitchOn, Bit1=EnableVoltage, Bit2=QuickStop (active low), Bit3=EnableOperation, Bit7=FaultReset, Bit8=Halt, Bit11=StartForward, Bit12=StartReverse. RPDO1-mapped.
descriptions.6041: CiA 442 Status word. Read by PLC to determine device state. Bit0=ReadyToSwitchOn, Bit1=SwitchedOn, Bit2=OperationEnabled, Bit3=Fault, Bit4=VoltageEnabled, Bit5=QuickStop, Bit6=SwitchOnDisabled, Bit7=Warning, Bit10=TargetReached, Bit11=InternalLimitActive. TPDO4-mapped.
descriptions.6042: Motor command object. sub1=command byte (0=Stop, 1=StartForward, 2=StartReverse, 3=FaultReset, 4=EmergencyStart, 5=QuickStop). sub2=qualifier flags (Bit0=Jog/Inching, Bit1=Override protection, Bit2=Simulation mode). RPDO1-mapped.
descriptions.6042sub1: Motor command byte. 0=Stop, 1=StartForward, 2=StartReverse, 3=FaultReset, 4=EmergencyStart (bypasses thermal inhibit — use with caution), 5=QuickStop.
descriptions.6042sub2: Motor command qualifier flags. Bit0=Jog/Inching (motor runs only while command active). Bit1=Override protection (use only for emergency). Bit2=Simulation mode.
descriptions.6043: Digital output force command. 8-bit bitmap: Bit N forces DO(N+1) ON when set. Clears to return DO to application control. Only active bits force outputs; others follow application logic. RPDO2-mapped.
descriptions.6044: Digital input status. 8-bit bitmap: Bit N = DI(N+1) current state. 1=active/energised. Reflects debounced hardware state after PAR.DX_DI_DELAY filter. TPDO4-mapped.
descriptions.6050: Digital output actual state. 8-bit bitmap: Bit N = DO(N+1) actual hardware state. 1=energised. Reflects real output regardless of whether command source is application, force command (6043h), or fault reaction. TPDO4-mapped.
descriptions.6060: CiA 442 FSA (Finite State Automaton) state. Decoded state machine state: 0=NotReadyToSwitchOn, 1=SwitchOnDisabled, 2=ReadyToSwitchOn, 3=SwitchedOn, 4=OperationEnabled, 7=QuickStopActive, 8=FaultReactionActive, 9=Fault. TPDO4-mapped.
descriptions.2000: Current measurements. sub1=avg current as 0.1%Ie (UNSIGNED16, TPDO2-mapped). sub2-4=L1/L2/L3 RMS in milliamperes (UNSIGNED32, SDO only). sub5=earth-fault current mA (SDO only). sub6=imbalance % (TPDO2-mapped). sub7=avg current absolute mA (SDO only).
descriptions.2000sub1: Average motor current as percentage of Ie. UNSIGNED16. Unit: 0.1% of Ie. 10000 = 100.0% Ie. Range 0-65535 covers 0-6553.5% Ie, sufficient for 15x locked rotor overcurrent. TPDO2-mapped.
descriptions.2000sub2: L1 phase RMS current in milliamperes. UNSIGNED32. SDO read only. Full measurement resolution. For per-phase diagnostics and logging.
descriptions.2000sub3: L2 phase RMS current in milliamperes. UNSIGNED32. SDO only.
descriptions.2000sub4: L3 phase RMS current in milliamperes. UNSIGNED32. SDO only.
descriptions.2000sub5: Earth fault current in milliamperes. UNSIGNED32. SDO only. Computed as vector sum of three phase currents. Detectable above ~20% Ie in low-impedance grounded networks.
descriptions.2000sub6: Phase current imbalance percentage. UNSIGNED8. Formula: 100*(1-Imin/Imax). Active only when average current >25% Ie. 0-100%. TPDO2-mapped.
descriptions.2000sub7: Average phase current in milliamperes (absolute). UNSIGNED32. SDO only. Average of L1/L2/L3.
descriptions.2001: Voltage measurements. Requires VI15x voltage measurement module. sub1=avg voltage 0.01%Vnom (TPDO2-mapped). sub2-4=L12/L23/L31 line voltages in millivolts (SDO only). sub5=voltage imbalance % (TPDO2-mapped). sub6=supply frequency 0.01Hz (SDO only).
descriptions.2001sub1: Average line-to-line voltage as percentage of Vnom. UNSIGNED16. Unit: 0.01% of Vnom (PAR.VOLT_NOMINAL). 10000 = 100.00% Vnom. TPDO2-mapped. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2001sub2: L1-L2 line voltage in millivolts. UNSIGNED32. SDO only. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2001sub3: L2-L3 line voltage in millivolts. UNSIGNED32. SDO only. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2001sub4: L3-L1 line voltage in millivolts. UNSIGNED32. SDO only. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2001sub5: Voltage imbalance percentage. UNSIGNED8. Formula: 100*max_deviation(U12,U23,U31)/Uavg. 0-100%. TPDO2-mapped. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2001sub6: Supply frequency in 0.01Hz units. UNSIGNED16. 5000=50.00Hz, 6000=60.00Hz. SDO only. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2002: Power measurements. Units depend on PAR.POWER_SCALE_FACTOR (1/10/100/1000 → W/10W/100W/kW). Requires VI15x. sub4=cos phi UNSIGNED8 TPDO2-mapped.
descriptions.2002sub1: Active power P. UNSIGNED32. SDO only. Units per PAR.POWER_SCALE_FACTOR.
descriptions.2002sub2: Reactive power Q. UNSIGNED32. SDO only.
descriptions.2002sub3: Apparent power S (VA). UNSIGNED32. SDO only.
descriptions.2002sub4: Power factor cos phi. UNSIGNED8. 0-100 represents 0.00-1.00. Divide by 100 for float value. TPDO2-mapped. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2002sub5: Active power as percentage of nominal power Pnom. UNSIGNED8. 0-200%. SDO only. Pnom calculated internally as Ie*Vnom*cosPhi_nom*sqrt(3) using PAR.SETTING_IE1, PAR.VOLT_NOMINAL, PAR.NOMINAL_PF.
descriptions.2003: Thermal model state outputs. sub1=thermal load % (TPDO3). sub2=time-to-trip seconds (TPDO3, 0xFFFF=not in overload). sub3=time-to-cool seconds (TPDO3, 0=restart allowed). sub4=PTC temperature 0.1°C INTEGER16 (TPDO3, 0x7FFF=sensor absent).
descriptions.2003sub1: Thermal capacity used as percentage. UNSIGNED8. 0-100%. 100%=thermal overload trip. Warning generated at PAR.THERM_WARN_LEVEL. TPDO3-mapped.
descriptions.2003sub2: Estimated time until thermal overload trip in seconds. UNSIGNED16. TPDO3-mapped. 0xFFFF (65535) means motor is not currently in overload — indefinite time remaining.
descriptions.2003sub3: Remaining cooling inhibit time in seconds. UNSIGNED16. TPDO3-mapped. 0=restart permitted. 0xFFFF=cooling mode is RestartLevel-based (see PAR.COOLING_MODE), not time-based.
descriptions.2003sub4: PTC thermistor temperature in 0.1°C units. INTEGER16 (signed). TPDO3-mapped. Divide by 10 for °C. 0x7FFF=PTC not connected or PAR.PTC_MODE=Disabled. Requires physical PTC connection.
descriptions.2004: Device operating statistics. sub1=total operating hours (minutes, UNSIGNED32, SDO only). sub2=start counter mod 65535 (UNSIGNED16, TPDO4-mapped). sub3=full start counter (UNSIGNED32, SDO only). sub4=total trip counter (SDO only).
descriptions.2004sub1: Total motor operating hours in minutes. UNSIGNED32. SDO only. Not reset on power cycle. Stored in non-volatile memory. Maximum ~8171 years at UNSIGNED32.
descriptions.2004sub2: Motor start counter (modulo 65535). UNSIGNED16. TPDO4-mapped. Wraps at 65535. Use sub3 for full 32-bit count.
descriptions.2004sub3: Motor start counter (full 32-bit). UNSIGNED32. SDO only.
descriptions.2004sub4: Total protection trip counter. UNSIGNED16. SDO only. Counts all protection events regardless of type.
descriptions.2005: ERR (trip) flag bitmap words. 13 x UNSIGNED16 covering flag indices 0-207. Words 0-1 (bits 0-31) in TPDO1. Words 2-3 (bits 32-63) in TPDO5. Words 4-12 (bits 64-207) SDO-only. Each bit corresponds to a specific protection trip event — see ulm_flags.json for full index mapping.
descriptions.2005sub1: ERR flags word 0: bits 0-15. Bit0=D_ERR_TRIP_THERM, Bit1=D_ERR_PHASE_LOSS_I_U, Bit2=D_ERR_PHASE_IMBALANCE_I_U, Bit3=D_ERR_LOCKED_ROTOR_STARTUP, Bit5=D_ERR_PTC_TEMP, Bit7=D_ERR_CHECK_BACK, Bit8=D_ERR_LOW_CURRENT, Bit10=D_ERR_HIGH_CURRENT, Bit12=D_ERR_EXT_INT_EARTH_FAULT. TPDO1-mapped.
descriptions.2005sub2: ERR flags word 1: bits 16-31. Bit14=D_ERR_SELFTEST_UMC_HW, Bit15=D_ERR_ACTUATOR, Bit16=D_ERR_APPL_IO_MODULE_MISSING. TPDO1-mapped.
descriptions.2005sub3: ERR flags word 2: bits 32-47. Actuator detail faults and auxiliary input faults. TPDO5-mapped.
descriptions.2005sub4: ERR flags word 3: bits 48-63. Additional actuator and module faults. TPDO5-mapped.
descriptions.2005sub5: ERR flags w4 bits 64-79. ERR bits 64-79: Actuator details: TO/TC/PO-PC/POtime/PCtime
descriptions.2005sub6: ERR flags w5 bits 80-95. ERR bits 80-95: ActuatorRunTime/CheckbackRelay/YD/CheckbackI/PTCwb/PTCsc
descriptions.2005sub7: ERR flags w6 bits 96-111. ERR bits 96-111: BinIOMissing/AM1Missing/AM2Missing/VI15xMissing/AOoverload/AObreak
descriptions.2005sub8: ERR flags w7 bits 112-127. ERR bits 112-127: VI15x1phase/LowVoltage/HighVoltage/AM1-CH1-3 errors
descriptions.2005sub9: ERR flags w8 bits 128-143. ERR bits 128-143: AM2-CH1-3 errors / Selftest non-resettable (0x80-0x8F)
descriptions.2005sub10: ERR flags w9 bits 144-159. ERR bits 144-159: Selftest codes / DIP / ParamUpload / AM1 HH-LL channels
descriptions.2005sub11: ERR flags w10 bits 160-175. ERR bits 160-175: AM1 CH2-3 HH-LL / AM2 CH1 HH-LL levels
descriptions.2005sub12: ERR flags w11 bits 176-191. ERR bits 176-191: AM2 CH2-3 HH-LL / AM MaxTemp / StandStill / ParamInvers
descriptions.2005sub13: ERR flags w12 bits 192-207. ERR bits 192-207: FBP comm fault (index 200)
descriptions.2006: WARN (warning) flag bitmap words. 13 x UNSIGNED16. Same index layout as ERR flags (2005h). Words 0-1 in TPDO1. Words 2-3 in TPDO5. Words 4-12 SDO only.
descriptions.2006sub1: WARN flags word 0: bits 0-15. Bit2=D_WARN_PHASE_IMBALANCE_I_U, Bit4=D_WARN_THERM_LOAD_HIGH, Bit5=D_WARN_PTC_TEMP. TPDO1-mapped.
descriptions.2006sub2: WARN flags word 1: bits 16-31. Bit19=D_WARN_AUX_INP_1 through Bit24=D_WARN_AUX_INP_6. TPDO1-mapped.
descriptions.2006sub5: WARN flags w4 bits 64-79. WARN bits 64-79: NoStartPossible/NumStartsExceed/JustOneStartPos/CoolingTimeRunning
descriptions.2006sub6: WARN flags w5 bits 80-95. WARN bits 80-95: Actuator details: PO/PC arrive/leave without command
descriptions.2006sub7: WARN flags w6 bits 96-111. WARN bits 96-111: ActuatorRunTime/OpHourExceeded/ParChangeNotAllowed/WrongPassword
descriptions.2006sub8: WARN flags w7 bits 112-127. WARN bits 112-127: CurrFreq/PhaseSeq/SelftestRun/AM1-CH1-3 wire/sensor/range
descriptions.2006sub9: WARN flags w8 bits 128-143. WARN bits 128-143: AM2-CH1-3 wire/sensor/range errors
descriptions.2006sub10: WARN flags w9 bits 144-159. WARN bits 144-159: AM1 CH1-3 H/L threshold warnings
descriptions.2006sub11: WARN flags w10 bits 160-175. WARN bits 160-175: AM1 CH2-3 / AM2 CH1 H/L warnings
descriptions.2006sub12: WARN flags w11 bits 176-191. WARN bits 176-191: AM2 CH2-3 H/L / MaxTemp / StandStill
descriptions.2006sub13: WARN flags w12 bits 192-207. WARN bits 192-207: (reserved)
descriptions.2007: Last trip snapshot. Values captured at the moment of the most recent protection trip. Read via SDO for post-mortem analysis. Cleared on power cycle.
descriptions.2007sub1: ERR flags word 0 at trip instant.
descriptions.2007sub2: WARN flags word 0 at trip instant.
descriptions.2007sub3: Average current at trip in 0.1%Ie units (same encoding as 2000h:01).
descriptions.2007sub5: Average voltage at trip in 0.01%Vnom units (same encoding as 2001h:01).
descriptions.2007sub6: PTC temperature at trip in 0.1°C (same encoding as 2003h:04).
descriptions.2008: Total Harmonic Distortion measurements. sub1=THD-I current % (TPDO2-mapped). sub2=THD-V voltage % (SDO only). Both require VI15x voltage measurement module.
descriptions.2008sub1: Current Total Harmonic Distortion percentage. UNSIGNED8. 0-100%. TPDO2-mapped. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2008sub2: Voltage Total Harmonic Distortion percentage. UNSIGNED8. 0-100%. SDO only. Requires VI15x.
descriptions.2100: Motor Management parameters. Controls starter type (DOL/Reverse/Star-Delta/Actuator/Softstarter), direction interlocking, changeover timing, fault output behavior, checkback supervision, number-of-phases, and custom logic enable.
descriptions.2100sub1: Fault auto reset [14]. Automatically reset selected protection trips
descriptions.2100sub2: Emergency Start [15]. ALLow emergency start despite protection state
descriptions.2100sub3: Rev lock-out time [19]. Interlocking time before opposite direction is accepted
descriptions.2100sub4: Control function [20]. Defines the type of starter function
descriptions.2100sub5: YD starting time [21]. Time switching from star to delta (or time to reach <90% of Ie)
descriptions.2100sub6: YD changeover mode [22]. Star→Delta changeover based on time or current threshold
descriptions.2100sub7: Checkback time [23]. Max delay until checkback signal present
descriptions.2100sub9: Fault output [25]. Behavior of DO2/DO3 on trip/fault
descriptions.2100sub10: Number of phases [26]. Select single-phase or three-phase load
descriptions.2100sub12: Inching DI start input ( [47]. Enable jogging of DI start input
descriptions.2100sub13: Time Limit Actuator [86]. Maximum travel time from one end position to the opposite
descriptions.2100sub14: Enable custom logic [96]. Enable execution of customer-defined application
descriptions.2100sub15: Num Starts ALLowed [148]. Max starts in window
descriptions.2100sub17: Num Starts Pause [150]. Pause time after stop
descriptions.2100sub18: Num Starts Overrun [155]. Reaction when no starts left
descriptions.2100sub19: Motor operating hours le [192]. Weeks of operation before warning
descriptions.2100sub20: Motor stand still level [193]. Weeks of continuous standstill before warning
descriptions.2100sub21: Num Starts Prewarn [221]. Reaction when one start left
descriptions.2110: Protection parameters. Thermal model (Ie, trip class, cooling), earth fault, current (low/high/locked rotor/imbalance/phase loss), voltage (low/high/imbalance), power (low/high), power factor, THD, PTC thermistor, phase sequence, and DIP function parameters.
descriptions.2110sub2: Earth Flt Trip Level [10]. Ground fault current trip threshold
descriptions.2110sub3: Earth Flt Trip Delay [11]. Delay before ground fault trip
descriptions.2110sub4: Earth Flt Warn Level [12]. Ground fault warning threshold
descriptions.2110sub5: Earth Flt Warn Delay [13]. Delay before ground fault warning
descriptions.2110sub6: Earth Flt Detection [16]. When ground fault detection is active
descriptions.2110sub7: Setting Ie1 [28]. Nominal motor current speed 1
descriptions.2110sub8: Setting Ie2 [30]. Nominal motor current speed 2
descriptions.2110sub10: Low current trip level [32]. Trip below % of I/Ie
descriptions.2110sub11: Low current trip delay [33]. Delay for low current trip
descriptions.2110sub12: Low current warn level [34]. Warn below % of I/Ie
descriptions.2110sub13: Low current warn delay [35]. Delay for low current warn
descriptions.2110sub14: High current trip level [36]. Trip above % of I/Ie
descriptions.2110sub15: High current trip delay [37]. Delay for high current trip
descriptions.2110sub16: High current warn level [38]. Warn above % of I/Ie
descriptions.2110sub17: High current warn delay [39]. Delay for high current warn
descriptions.2110sub18: Locked rotor trip level [40]. Start-up locked-rotor threshold
descriptions.2110sub19: Locked rotor trip delay [41]. Delay before LR trip
descriptions.2110sub20: Phase loss protection [42]. Enable phase loss protection
descriptions.2110sub21: Current imbalance trip l [43]. Imbalance trip threshold
descriptions.2110sub22: Current imbalance warn l [44]. Imbalance warning threshold
descriptions.2110sub23: Phase reversal [45]. Phase order check mode
descriptions.2110sub24: Check phase sequence [46]. Enable phase sequence supervision
descriptions.2110sub26: Thermal load warning lev [49]. Warn at thermal model %
descriptions.2110sub28: Dip Enable [142]. Enable/disable voltage dip function
descriptions.2110sub29: Cooling time [146]. Restart inhibit time after thermal trip
descriptions.2160: IO Configuration parameters. Module presence flags (DX1xx, VI15x, AI111), missing module reaction, digital input debounce delay, analog output type and error reaction, AI111 channel types and error reactions for AM1 and AM2 modules.
descriptions.2160sub2: AI111 AM1 Enabled [2]. Analog module AM1 present
descriptions.2160sub3: AI111 AM2 Enabled [3]. Analog module AM2 present
descriptions.2160sub5: Missing Module Reaction [8]. Reaction when IO module missing
descriptions.2160sub6: DX1xx DI delay [151]. Digital input delay (ms/50Hz)
descriptions.2160sub7: DX1xx AO type [152]. Analog output type
descriptions.2160sub8: DX1xx AO error reaction [153]. Reaction on AO error
descriptions.2160sub9: AM1 Tmax Delay [154]. Delay before AM1 temperature trip
descriptions.2160sub10: AM2 Tmax Delay [167]. Delay before AM2 temperature trip
descriptions.2160sub13: AM1 CH1 Type [182]. AM1 channel 1 type
descriptions.2160sub14: AM1 CH1 Err Reac [188]. AM1 CH1 error reaction
descriptions.2160sub15: AM1 CH2 Err Reac [189]. AM1 CH2 error reaction
descriptions.2160sub16: AM1 CH3 Err Reac [190]. AM1 CH3 error reaction
descriptions.2160sub17: AM2 CH1 Err Reac [191]. AM2 CH1 error reaction
descriptions.2170: Display parameters. LCD language, tag name, backlight, password protection level, user display value selections, temperature unit for AI111 channels.
descriptions.2170sub2: Tag name [124]. Display tag name part 1
descriptions.2170sub4: Password Protection [126]. Protect parameters and/or motor control
descriptions.2170sub5: User display 1 [128]. Top-level display value selection
descriptions.2170sub6: User display 2 [129]. Top-level display value selection
descriptions.2170sub7: User display 4 text [133]. Label for user display 4
descriptions.2170sub8: User display 5 text [134]. Label for user display 5
descriptions.2170sub9: LCD Panel T Unit [176]. Temperature unit for AI111
descriptions.2180: Communication parameters. Bus address, address check mode, busfault reaction (MotorOff/Retain/StartFor/StartRev), IO data profile selection.
descriptions.2180sub1: Address check [17]. Match bus address in UMC vs interface
descriptions.2180sub2: Busfault reaction [18]. UMC behavior on bus fault
descriptions.2200: System diagnostic fault codes. Non-protection faults indicating firmware or hardware integrity failures. These are distinct from motor protection flags (2005h/2006h). Require investigation and cannot be cleared by normal fault reset.
descriptions.2200sub1: FLAGS_INTEGRITY: Flag memory integrity check failed. Indicates flag storage corruption. Device should be inspected.
descriptions.2200sub2: WATCHDOG_RESET: Watchdog-triggered CPU reset detected at startup. Indicates previous firmware hang or power fault.
descriptions.2200sub3: PARAM_CRC_MISMATCH: Parameter block CRC32 verification failed. Parameters may have been corrupted. Reload defaults and reconfigure.
descriptions.2200sub4: BSP_FLASH_CRC: Firmware flash CRC mismatch at startup. Firmware image may be corrupted. Reflash required.
descriptions.2200sub5: ASSERT: Software assertion failed at runtime. Indicates a programming error. Capture firmware version and report to ABB.
descriptions.2201: Firmware update control. EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) compliant firmware update interface. Motor must be stopped before initiating update. sub1=command byte (write 0xAB to enter bootloader). sub2=running version string. sub3=available update version (empty if none pending).
descriptions.2201sub1: Firmware update command. Write 0xAB to initiate firmware update sequence. Device will enter bootloader mode. Motor must be stopped. PAR.PARAMETER_LOCK must be Unlocked.
descriptions.2201sub2: Currently running firmware version string (semantic versioning: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH).
descriptions.2201sub3: Available firmware update version string. Empty string if no update is pending.
